title: Aurora, 33482, Palm Pals Sassy Unicorn, 5In, Soft Toy, White & Pink
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable White Unicorn cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: This white and pink Unicorn named Sassy fits into the palm of your hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and cuddly. Her body is a soft white and pink plush material with a silver horn. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Polar Bear. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
